title: opencode-slim-system plugin options
description: Configuration schema for the opencode-slim-system plugin options in opencode.jsonc

exclude.description: Tool IDs to keep at original stock descriptions (not slimmed)

tools.description: Inline description overrides for any tool ID (built-in or plugin). Highest priority.

prompt.description: Inline system prompt override. Takes precedence over promptFile and the config dir.

toolsDir.description: Custom path to a directory of {id}.txt tool description files. Default: ~/.config/opencode/slim-system/tool/

promptFile.description: Custom path to a system prompt text file. Default: ~/.config/opencode/slim-system/prompt/default.txt

reset.description: When true, wipes the config directory and reseeds from embedded defaults on next restart.
